revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{COinS safe|n}} {{Nosubst}}{{template shortcut|ISBN?}} {{Tl|ISBN missing}} is an inline cleanup template for flagging a reference that is missing the [[:en:International Standard Book Number|International Standard Book Number (ISBN)]] of the source document. The template adds [[:Category:Pages with missing ISBNs]] to the article. ==Usage== {{tlc|ISBN missing|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} or {{tlc|ISBN?|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} *With a reference formatted via a [[Help:Citation Style 1#Templates|Citation Style 1 template]] ({{Tlx|Cite web}}, {{Tlx|Cite book}}, {{Tlx|Citation}}, etc.): :#Place {{tlc|ISBN missing|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} outside the citation template :#{{warnsign|Do not place it in the {{para|isbn}} parameter of a Citation Style 1 template. The inclusion of text other than the digits of an ISBN in {{para|isbn}} corrupts the citation's [[WP:COinS|COinS]] metadata and the citation's link to [[Special:BookSources]].}} *With a free-form reference, just append {{tlc|ISBN missing|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} to the end of the citation. * With either method or format, it will render a {{ISBN?}} inline note. ==How to fix the problem flagged by this template== '''Do not remove the {{ISBN missing}} template without fixing the problem in one of the following ways:''' *'''Determine the ISBN, add it to the reference, then remove the {{ISBN missing}} template''' :For a reference formatted via a [[Help:Citation Style 1#Templates|Citation Style 1 template]], use its ISBN parameter: ::{{para|isbn|X-XXXX-XXXX-X}} :For a free-form reference: :#Add the ISBN as appropriate to the citation, preferably using the {{tl|ISBN}} template, or... :#''Better yet'', convert the citation to a [[Help:Citation Style 1#Templates|Citation Style 1 template]]. *'''If you are certain that the source document does not have an ISBN, add a {{tl|No ISBN}} template to the reference, then remove the {{ISBN missing}} template''' :For a reference formatted via a [[Help:Citation Style 1#Templates|Citation Style 1 template]]: ::1. Use its ISBN parameter to state explicitly that the ISBN does not exist: :::{{para|isbn|}} (''you must use HTML'' ''comment tags to hide the message from the citation processing software'') ::2. Place {{Tlx|No ISBN}} outside the citation template :For free-form reference, just add {{Tlx|No ISBN}} to the end of the citation. '''If you remove the {{ISBN missing}} template without fixing the problem in one of the above ways, someone else will come along later and flag the reference with {{ISBN missing}} again!''' ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "autovalue": "May 2025" } }, "format": "inline" } ==See also== *{{cl|Citation Style 1 templates}}, includes all Citation Style 1 templates *[[Wikipedia:ISBN]], describes how to add an ISBN to an article *{{tl|Lacking ISBN}} *{{tl|Listed Invalid ISBN}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] [[Category:International Standard Book Number templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
